experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
achievements: Built REST API endpoints for an internal reporting dashboard.
Added validation and error handling to improve API reliability.
Collaborated with two engineers using GitHub pull requests and code reviews.

projects.name: Job Application Co-Pilot
projects.description: A local Streamlit app that tailors CV bullets, cover letters, and application answers from a structured candidate profile.
highlights: Designed strict prompts that require generated CV bullets to cite profile facts.
Built a SQLite tracker for application status, fit score, ATS match, and export paths.
Generated LaTeX CV and cover letter files for human review.

projects.name: Campus Marketplace
projects.description: A marketplace where students can list, search, and message about campus items.
highlights: Implemented listing, authentication, and saved-item APIs.
Built reusable React components with form validation.
Designed search and filter flows for common student use cases.

short_term_goals: Secure a graduate software engineering role.
Build stronger backend, testing, and cloud deployment experience.
long_term_goals: Become a backend or full-stack engineer who designs reliable production systems.
Grow into technical leadership while continuing to build user-focused products.

additional_information.summary: Fresh software engineering graduate focused on backend systems, full-stack web applications, and AI-assisted productivity tools.
truthfulness_constraints: Do not mention GPA unless the profile contains CGPA.
Do not claim work authorization unless the candidate confirms it.
Do not add certifications that are not listed.

factual_accuracy_notes: Generated enrichment is advisory. Do not present suggestions as facts unless the candidate confirms them.
